question:

Choose the correct answer using the codes given below :

Consider the following art and architectural forms :
I. Rock-cut elephant at Dhauli in Orissa
II. Yakshi figure from Didarganj near Patna
III. Great Stupa at Sanchi in Madhya Pradesh
IV. 80-pillared hall at Komrahar near Patna
